name: Feature request

---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you want to happen. Include mockups, CLI examples, or API shapes if applicable.

## Alternatives considered

What alternatives have you considered? Why are they insufficient?

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or references.
